headline: Apple drops 6% on MacBook/iPad price hikes from memory crunch
detail: Apple cited a memory supply squeeze driving sharp price increases on key products. This is directly negative for memory and chip suppliers — Broadcom (AVGO) has deep Apple ties, making your largest losing position even more exposed today. Semis broadly (SMH) will feel this; watch for sympathy selling across your chip names.

headline: SpaceX stock called a 'terrible buy' — what it means for the bull market
detail: A high-profile bearish take on SpaceX signals skepticism about speculative, narrative-driven names in the current environment. You hold both SPCX and the 2x leveraged SPAL — negative sentiment on the underlying story can move these fast, especially SPAL which decays and amplifies downside. Manage both manually and keep stops tight given the thin IPO price history.

headline: Tesla and Waymo robotaxi race — biggest spender builds no cars
detail: Autonomous and space-tech speculation is in focus, which is the same investor mindset driving PLTR and your SpaceX plays. If risk appetite fades in these high-story names, PLTR — already down 17% and on a SELL signal — is vulnerable to further multiple compression. No direct catalyst here but confirms the sentiment environment for your speculative names is fragile.
